title: Attention Is All You Need
authors: Vaswani, Shazeer, Parmar, Uszkoreit, et al.
blurb: The 2017 paper that invented the Transformer — the architecture behind ChatGPT, Claude, and basically all modern AI. See where it actually started.

title: New Constraints on DMS and DMDS in the Atmosphere of K2-18 b
blurb: The JWST observations behind the "possible signs of life on another planet" headlines. Read what the scientists actually claimed — not the clickbait.

title: Emergent Abilities of Large Language Models
authors: Wei, Tay, Bommasani, Raffel, et al.
blurb: Why do AI models suddenly get good at things nobody trained them for? A famous investigation of abilities that appear out of nowhere at scale.
